---
title: "PyApprox Tutorial Library"
subtitle: "Validated tutorials for uncertainty quantification"
---

## Getting Started

| Tutorial | Description |
|----------|-------------|
| [Setup Environment](setup_environment.qmd) | Install PyApprox and verify your setup |
| [From Models to Decisions Under Uncertainty](models_decisions_uncertainty.qmd) | Why computational models need UQ, grounded in a composite cantilever beam |
